name: Space Button
description: A customizable button with options for icon, text, size, style, and state to fit different interactions.

props.name: text
props.title: Button text
props.description: The text displayed on the button.

props.name: url
props.title: URL
props.description: The action URL that the button links to when clicked.

props.name: variant
props.title: Variants
props.description: The visual style of the button (e.g., primary, secondary).

props.name: size
props.title: Size
props.description: The size of the button (e.g., small, medium, large).

props.name: button_corners
props.title: Corners
props.description: The style of the button corners (e.g., rounded or square).

props.name: button_type
props.title: Type
props.description: The type of button, determining whether it shows only an icon, only text, or both.

props.name: icon
props.title: Icon name
props.description: The ID of an icon from the Phosphor Icons library.

props.name: icon_alignment
props.title: Icon alignment
props.description: The alignment of the icon relative to the button text (left or right).

props.name: expanded
props.title: Expanded
props.description: Whether the button should be full width or auto width.

props.name: button_state
props.title: State
props.description: The state of the button (e.g., focused or disabled).

name: Space Heading
description: A customizable heading component with configurable text, color, tag, font, and alignment options.

examples: SPACE is the Complete Team Collaboration Solution.

props.name: title_color

props.name: tag_name
props.title: Tag
props.description: The HTML tag to be used for the heading (e.g., h1, h2).

props.name: spacing_bottom
props.title: Spacing bottom
props.description: The bottom spacing for the heading.

props.name: align
props.title: Align
props.description: The alignment of the heading (e.g., left, right, center).

props.name: url
props.title: URL
props.description: The URL that the heading links to.

props.name: icon
props.title: Icon name
props.description: The ID of an icon from the Phosphor Icons library.

name: Space Image

props.name: image_caption

props.name: loading

props.description: Keep this set to "lazy" unless you are absolutely sure this will always appear "Above the fold" on page load.

name: Space Section heading
description: The **Space Section Heading** is a component used to introduce and provide context for a section of a webpage. It allows adding a label, a main title, and a descriptive text block, with configurable alignment options.

name: Space Accordion
description: This component allows for the display of collapsible content sections, ideal for presenting frequently asked questions, detailed information, or nested content in a compact manner. It helps in organizing large amounts of text by showing only a summary initially, expanding upon user interaction. Use this component to improve content scannability and reduce visual clutter on a page.

slots.name: items
slots.title: Accordion Items
slots.description: Add one or more **Accordion Item** components into this slot; each item will render as a collapsible panel inside the accordion.

name: Space CTA Banner
description: The **Space CTA Banner - Type 1** is a call-to-action banner designed to highlight key messages and encourage user interaction. It supports a title, description, and flexible content placement for CTAs such as buttons or links.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: The title of the CTA Banner.

props.name: description
props.title: Description
props.description: The description of the CTA Banner.
examples: Maecenas vestibulum mollis diam. In ac felis quis tortor malesuada pretium.

props.description: Set image as background image of section.

slots.title: Content

name: Space Detail Page Hero Banner
description: This component renders a prominent Detail Page Hero Banner, designed for the top of a page to create a strong initial impact. It integrates a background image with a main title and sub-headline, effectively communicating a key message to the user. Use this component to introduce a page or section, drawing attention to its core purpose or offering.
